name: Glue Bullet
description:
Ammunition round

Activate (1 Action) (manipulate)

These cartridges are filled with sticky clear glue. When a glue bullet hits, a syrupy webbing coats the target and sticks to the ground or a nearby surface, hindering their movement. The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 2d4 rounds, or until it escape dc=18{Escapes} against a DC of 18. On a critical hit, the target is also Immobilized until it Escapes.
